---
title: "Pilot Analysis (final checkpoint, last layer)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 4)
```

## Setup

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
```

```{r load-data}
MODEL_LEVELS <- c("125m", "350m", "1.3b", "olmo-1b", "olmo-7b")

babylm_freqs    <- read_csv("../Data/babylm_corpus_freqs.csv") %>%
  select(phrase_AB, overall_freq, rel_freq)

infinigram_path <- "../Data/infinigram_freqs.csv"
infinigram_freqs <- if (file.exists(infinigram_path)) {
  read_csv(infinigram_path) %>% select(phrase_AB, overall_freq, rel_freq)
} else {
  tibble(phrase_AB = character(), overall_freq = double(), rel_freq = double())
}

join_freqs <- function(df) {
  bind_rows(
    df %>% filter(model_size %in% c("125m", "350m", "1.3b")) %>%
      left_join(babylm_freqs, by = "phrase_AB"),
    df %>% filter(model_size %in% c("olmo-1b", "olmo-7b")) %>%
      left_join(infinigram_freqs, by = "phrase_AB")
  )
}

filter_final <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    group_by(model_size) %>%
    filter(tokens == max(tokens), layer == max(layer)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

sc <- function(x) as.vector(scale(x))
```

```{r data-check}
cos_path  <- "../Data/cosine_similarity.csv"
comp_path <- "../Data/compositional_similarity.csv"
proc_path <- "../results/binomial_representations.csv"

cat("Files present:\n")
cat(sprintf("  cosine_similarity.csv:         %s\n", file.exists(cos_path)))
cat(sprintf("  compositional_similarity.csv:  %s\n", file.exists(comp_path)))
cat(sprintf("  binomial_representations.csv:  %s\n", file.exists(proc_path)))
cat(sprintf("  infinigram_freqs.csv:          %s\n", file.exists(infinigram_path)))
```

---

## In-Context Cosine Similarity

```{r cos-load, eval=file.exists(cos_path)}
cos <- read_csv(cos_path) %>%
  mutate(model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS)) %>%
  group_by(model, model_size, checkpoint, step, tokens, phrase_AB, layer) %>%
  summarise(cosine_sim = mean(cosine_sim, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter_final() %>%
  join_freqs() %>%
  filter(!is.na(overall_freq), overall_freq > 0, !is.na(cosine_sim)) %>%
  mutate(
    log_freq    = log(overall_freq),
    log_freq_sc = sc(log_freq),
    ord_dom     = abs(rel_freq - 0.5),
    ord_dom_sc  = sc(ord_dom),
    ord_dom_bin = cut(ord_dom,
                      breaks = quantile(ord_dom, c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE),
                      labels = c("Balanced", "Moderate", "Dominant"),
                      include.lowest = TRUE)
  )

cos_sizes <- levels(droplevels(cos$model_size))
cat("Models:", paste(cos_sizes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("N per model:\n"); print(count(cos, model_size))
cat(sprintf("\nCosine sim range: %.3f – %.3f  (mean %.3f)\n",
            min(cos$cosine_sim), max(cos$cosine_sim), mean(cos$cosine_sim)))
```

```{r cos-dist, eval=file.exists(cos_path), fig.height=3}
cos %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cosine_sim, fill = model_size)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Cosine similarity (AB vs BA)", y = "Count",
       title = "Distribution of in-context cosine similarity") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r cos-freq, eval=file.exists(cos_path)}
cos %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = cosine_sim, colour = ord_dom)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "|RelFreq − 0.5|") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "Cosine similarity (AB vs BA)",
       title = "Cosine similarity vs frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r cos-interaction, eval=file.exists(cos_path)}
cos %>%
  filter(!is.na(ord_dom_bin)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = cosine_sim,
             colour = ord_dom_bin, fill = ord_dom_bin)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2", aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"),
                      name = "Ordering dominance") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "Cosine similarity (AB vs BA)",
       title = "Frequency × ordering dominance") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r cos-lm, eval=file.exists(cos_path), fig.height=3.5}
cos_sizes %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_dfr(function(size) {
    lm(cosine_sim ~ log_freq_sc * ord_dom_sc,
       data = cos %>% filter(model_size == size)) %>%
      tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)")
  }, .id = "model_size") %>%
  mutate(
    model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS),
    term = recode(term,
                  log_freq_sc              = "log freq",
                  ord_dom_sc               = "ordering dominance",
                  `log_freq_sc:ord_dom_sc` = "freq × dom")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = estimate, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high,
             y = term, colour = model_size)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Model") +
  labs(x = "OLS estimate (95% CI)", y = NULL,
       title = "Cosine similarity: OLS coefficients") +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## Compositional Similarity (LogCosSim)

```{r comp-load, eval=file.exists(comp_path)}
comp <- read_csv(comp_path) %>%
  mutate(model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS)) %>%
  filter_final() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = ordering, values_from = mean_cosine_sim,
              names_prefix = "comp_sim_") %>%
  join_freqs() %>%
  filter(!is.na(overall_freq), overall_freq > 0,
         !is.na(comp_sim_AB), comp_sim_AB > 0,
         !is.na(comp_sim_BA), comp_sim_BA > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    LogCosSim   = log(comp_sim_AB / comp_sim_BA),
    log_freq    = log(overall_freq),
    log_freq_sc = sc(log_freq),
    relfreq_c   = rel_freq - 0.5,
    relfreq_bin = cut(relfreq_c,
                      breaks = quantile(relfreq_c, c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE),
                      labels = c("BA-dominant", "Balanced", "AB-dominant"),
                      include.lowest = TRUE)
  )

comp_sizes <- levels(droplevels(comp$model_size))
cat("Models:", paste(comp_sizes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("N per model:\n"); print(count(comp, model_size))
cat(sprintf("\nLogCosSim range: %.3f – %.3f  (mean %.3f)\n",
            min(comp$LogCosSim), max(comp$LogCosSim), mean(comp$LogCosSim)))
```

```{r comp-dist, eval=file.exists(comp_path), fig.height=3}
comp %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = LogCosSim, fill = model_size)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "LogCosSim", y = "Count",
       title = "Distribution of LogCosSim") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r comp-freq, eval=file.exists(comp_path)}
comp %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = LogCosSim, colour = relfreq_c)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "#2166ac", mid = "grey80", high = "#d6604d",
                         midpoint = 0, name = "RelFreq − 0.5") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "LogCosSim",
       title = "LogCosSim vs frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r comp-interaction, eval=file.exists(comp_path)}
comp %>%
  filter(!is.na(relfreq_bin)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = LogCosSim,
             colour = relfreq_bin, fill = relfreq_bin)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "RdBu", direction = -1,
                      aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"),
                      name = "Ordering preference") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "LogCosSim",
       title = "Frequency × relative frequency") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r comp-lm, eval=file.exists(comp_path), fig.height=3.5}
comp_sizes %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_dfr(function(size) {
    lm(LogCosSim ~ log_freq_sc * relfreq_c,
       data = comp %>% filter(model_size == size)) %>%
      tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)")
  }, .id = "model_size") %>%
  mutate(
    model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS),
    term = recode(term,
                  log_freq_sc             = "log freq",
                  relfreq_c               = "relative freq",
                  `log_freq_sc:relfreq_c` = "freq × relfreq")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = estimate, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high,
             y = term, colour = model_size)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Model") +
  labs(x = "OLS estimate (95% CI)", y = NULL,
       title = "LogCosSim: OLS coefficients") +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## Procrustes Distance

```{r proc-load, eval=file.exists(proc_path)}
proc <- read_csv(proc_path) %>%
  select(-any_of(c("overall_freq", "rel_freq"))) %>%
  mutate(model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS)) %>%
  filter_final() %>%
  join_freqs() %>%
  filter(!is.na(overall_freq), overall_freq > 0, !is.na(procrustes_dist)) %>%
  mutate(
    log_freq    = log(overall_freq),
    log_freq_sc = sc(log_freq),
    ord_dom     = abs(rel_freq - 0.5),
    ord_dom_sc  = sc(ord_dom),
    ord_dom_bin = cut(ord_dom,
                      breaks = quantile(ord_dom, c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE),
                      labels = c("Balanced", "Moderate", "Dominant"),
                      include.lowest = TRUE)
  )

proc_sizes <- levels(droplevels(proc$model_size))
cat("Models:", paste(proc_sizes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("N per model:\n"); print(count(proc, model_size))
cat(sprintf("\nProcrustes dist range: %.3f – %.3f  (mean %.3f)\n",
            min(proc$procrustes_dist), max(proc$procrustes_dist),
            mean(proc$procrustes_dist)))
```

```{r proc-dist, eval=file.exists(proc_path), fig.height=3}
proc %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = procrustes_dist, fill = model_size)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Procrustes distance", y = "Count",
       title = "Distribution of Procrustes distance") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r proc-freq, eval=file.exists(proc_path)}
proc %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = procrustes_dist, colour = ord_dom)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "|RelFreq − 0.5|") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "Procrustes distance",
       title = "Procrustes distance vs frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r proc-interaction, eval=file.exists(proc_path)}
proc %>%
  filter(!is.na(ord_dom_bin)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log_freq, y = procrustes_dist,
             colour = ord_dom_bin, fill = ord_dom_bin)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~model_size, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2", aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"),
                      name = "Ordering dominance") +
  labs(x = "log(overall frequency)", y = "Procrustes distance",
       title = "Frequency × ordering dominance") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r proc-lm, eval=file.exists(proc_path), fig.height=3.5}
proc_sizes %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_dfr(function(size) {
    lm(procrustes_dist ~ log_freq_sc * ord_dom_sc,
       data = proc %>% filter(model_size == size)) %>%
      tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)")
  }, .id = "model_size") %>%
  mutate(
    model_size = factor(model_size, levels = MODEL_LEVELS),
    term = recode(term,
                  log_freq_sc              = "log freq",
                  ord_dom_sc               = "ordering dominance",
                  `log_freq_sc:ord_dom_sc` = "freq × dom")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = estimate, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high,
             y = term, colour = model_size)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Model") +
  labs(x = "OLS estimate (95% CI)", y = NULL,
       title = "Procrustes distance: OLS coefficients") +
  theme_minimal()
```
